free_text: Study of the spectra of fast deuterons produced in the
interaction of 670 MeV protons with nuclei
presented by V.P.Dzhelepov, Proc. 3rd Int.Conf. on
High Energy Physics and Nuclear Structure, ed. S.Devons
V.P.Dzhelepov presented a set of experiments that made
in the Laboratory of Nuclear Problem in Dubna.
at an angle 6.5 degr. in interaction of 670-MeV protons
Corrections were made for the dead-time of the
detection apparatus and for deuteron multiple
scattering in the target, air and scintillator.
The dispersion theory of direct nuclear
The spectra of deuterons emitted at angles of 6.5,9.5,
13.5 and 16 degrees (lab. system) in the interaction
of protons with the nuclei H-1,H-2,Li-6,C,Al,Cu,Rh and
Pb have been measured in the momentum range
errors due to the correction of the deuteron spectra
and the experimental errors of the cross sections
